name: Source Fidelity review for Stem Cell Replacement And Transplantation bundle
summary: The staged source and finding accurately reflect the live ClinicalTrials.gov record for NCT06944522: exPDite-2 remains recruiting, has estimated enrollment of 102, has no posted results, lists primary completion in March 2027 and full completion in March 2032, and shows a June 5, 2026 last-update-posted date. The staged wording stays within that registry boundary and preserves the activity-only status.
